creator: lwhsu@FreeBSD.org
text:
6.0.2 also has:

Warning: Bad symlink '/usr/local/bin/libreoffice' pointing to an absolute pathname '/usr/local/lib/libreoffice/program/soffice'
Warning: Bad symlink '/usr/local/bin/soffice' pointing to an absolute pathname '/usr/local/lib/libreoffice/program/soffice'
Warning: Bad symlink '/usr/local/share/applications/libreoffice-impress.desktop' pointing to an absolute pathname '/usr/local/lib/libreoffice/share/xdg/impress.desktop'
Warning: Bad symlink '/usr/local/share/applications/libreoffice-xsltfilter.desktop' pointing to an absolute pathname '/usr/local/lib/libreoffice/share/xdg/xsltfilter.desktop'
Warning: Bad symlink '/usr/local/share/applications/libreoffice-math.desktop' pointing to an absolute pathname '/usr/local/lib/libreoffice/share/xdg/math.desktop'
Warning: Bad symlink '/usr/local/share/applications/libreoffice-startcenter.desktop' pointing to an absolute pathname '/usr/local/lib/libreoffice/share/xdg/startcenter.desktop'
Warning: Bad symlink '/usr/local/share/applications/libreoffice-writer.desktop' pointing to an absolute pathname '/usr/local/lib/libreoffice/share/xdg/writer.desktop'
Warning: Bad symlink '/usr/local/share/applications/libreoffice-draw.desktop' pointing to an absolute pathname '/usr/local/lib/libreoffice/share/xdg/draw.desktop'
Warning: Bad symlink '/usr/local/share/applications/libreoffice-calc.desktop' pointing to an absolute pathname '/usr/local/lib/libreoffice/share/xdg/calc.desktop'
Warning: Bad symlink '/usr/local/share/applications/libreoffice-base.desktop' pointing to an absolute pathname '/usr/local/lib/libreoffice/share/xdg/base.desktop'
Warning: you may not need USES=desktop-file-utils
Warning: you need USES=ssl
Error: /usr/local/lib/libreoffice/program/gengal.bin is linked to /usr/local/lib/libX11.so.6 from x11/libX11 but it is not declared as a dependency
Warning: you need USE_XORG+=x11
Error: /usr/local/lib/libreoffice/program/libcomphelper.so is linked to /usr/local/lib/libplds4.so from devel/nspr but it is not declared as a dependency
Warning: you need LIB_DEPENDS+=libplds4.so:devel/nspr
Error: /usr/local/lib/libreoffice/program/libcomphelper.so is linked to /usr/local/lib/libplc4.so from devel/nspr but it is not declared as a dependency
Warning: you need LIB_DEPENDS+=libplc4.so:devel/nspr
Error: /usr/local/lib/libreoffice/program/libcomphelper.so is linked to /usr/local/lib/libnspr4.so from devel/nspr but it is not declared as a dependency
Warning: you need LIB_DEPENDS+=libnspr4.so:devel/nspr
Error: /usr/local/lib/libreoffice/program/libdesktop_detectorlo.so is linked to /usr/local/lib/libXext.so.6 from x11/libXext but it is not declared as a dependency
Warning: you need USE_XORG+=xext
Error: /usr/local/lib/libreoffice/program/libdesktop_detectorlo.so is linked to /usr/local/lib/libSM.so.6 from x11/libSM but it is not declared as a dependency
Warning: you need USE_XORG+=sm
Error: /usr/local/lib/libreoffice/program/libdesktop_detectorlo.so is linked to /usr/local/lib/libICE.so.6 from x11/libICE but it is not declared as a dependency
Warning: you need USE_XORG+=ice
Error: /usr/local/lib/libreoffice/program/libpdfimportlo.so is linked to /usr/local/lib/libfontconfig.so.1 from x11-fonts/fontconfig but it is not declared as a dependency
Warning: you need LIB_DEPENDS+=libfontconfig.so:x11-fonts/fontconfig
Error: /usr/local/lib/libreoffice/program/libpdfimportlo.so is linked to /usr/local/lib/libfreetype.so.6 from print/freetype2 but it is not declared as a dependency
Warning: you need LIB_DEPENDS+=libfreetype.so:print/freetype2
Error: /usr/local/lib/libreoffice/program/libunordflo.so is linked to /usr/local/lib/libraptor2.so.0 from textproc/raptor2 but it is not declared as a dependency
Warning: you need LIB_DEPENDS+=libraptor2.so:textproc/raptor2
Error: /usr/local/lib/libreoffice/program/libvclplug_genlo.so is linked to /usr/local/lib/libXrender.so.1 from x11/libXrender but it is not declared as a dependency
Warning: you need USE_XORG+=xrender
Error: /usr/local/lib/libreoffice/program/libvclplug_genlo.so is linked to /usr/local/lib/libXinerama.so.1 from x11/libXinerama but it is not declared as a dependency
Warning: you need USE_XORG+=xinerama
Error: /usr/local/lib/libreoffice/program/libxsec_xmlsec.so is linked to /usr/local/lib/libltdl.so.7 from devel/libltdl but it is not declared as a dependency
Warning: you need LIB_DEPENDS+=libltdl.so:devel/libltdl
Notice: You have some Perl modules as dependencies but you do not have devel/p5-Module-CoreList installed, the perlcore QA check gets better results when using it, especially with older Perl versions.
===>  Building package for libreoffice-6.0.2
